info.name: SuperStudy Core API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for all SuperStudy endpoints.
Base URL variable: base_url = http://localhost:3000
Global prefix: /api/v1
Auth: Bearer token in Authorization header.

request.description: Get all admin topic folders sorted by order
Create or update an admin topic folder
Delete an admin topic folder by ID
Reorder admin topic folders
Get all admin grammar folders sorted by order
Create or update an admin grammar folder
Delete an admin grammar folder by ID
Reorder admin grammar folders
Get all admin exam folders sorted by order
Create or update an admin exam folder
Delete an admin exam folder by ID
Reorder admin exam folders
List all topics; optional folderId filter
Get a single topic by ID
Create or update a topic
Update topic metadata
Toggle topic isPublic status
Toggle topic teacherVisible status
Soft-delete a topic (isDeleted = true)
Permanently delete a topic
Get topic folders for a teacher
All teacher topic folders across all teachers
Get soft-deleted topic folders for a teacher
Create or update a teacher topic folder
Reorder teacher topic folders
Soft-delete a teacher topic folder
Restore a soft-deleted teacher topic folder
Permanently delete a teacher topic folder
Get grammar folders for a teacher
All teacher grammar folders across all teachers
Get soft-deleted grammar folders for a teacher
Create or update a teacher grammar folder
Reorder teacher grammar folders
Soft-delete a teacher grammar folder
Restore a soft-deleted teacher grammar folder
Permanently delete a teacher grammar folder
Get exam folders for a teacher
All teacher exam folders across all teachers
Get soft-deleted exam folders for a teacher
Create or update a teacher exam folder
Reorder teacher exam folders
Soft-delete a teacher exam folder
Restore a soft-deleted teacher exam folder
Permanently delete a teacher exam folder
List teacher topics by teacherId (non-deleted)
List soft-deleted teacher topics
Get a single teacher topic by ID
Create a new teacher topic
Update a teacher topic
Soft-delete a teacher topic
Restore a soft-deleted teacher topic
Permanently delete a teacher topic
List grammar exercises; optional filter by createdByRole
List public + teacherVisible + individually shared exercises
List soft-deleted exercises
Get a single grammar exercise by ID
Create a new grammar exercise
Update a grammar exercise
Soft-delete a grammar exercise
Restore a soft-deleted grammar exercise
Permanently delete (cascades questions)
List questions for a grammar exercise (ordered)
Get a single grammar question by ID
Create a grammar question (auto-assigns order)

body.raw:
{
  "exerciseId": "64a000000000000000000020",
  "type": "multiple-choice",
  "purpose": "grammar",
  "questionText": "She ___ to school every day.",
  "options": [
    "go",
    "goes",
    "going",
    "gone"
  ],
  "correctAnswer": "goes",
  "explanation": "Third-person singular uses 'goes'."
}

request.description: Update a grammar question
Hard delete a grammar question
Bulk reorder grammar questions
List exams; optional filter by createdByRole
List public + teacherVisible + individually shared exams
List soft-deleted exams
Get a single exam by ID
Create a new exam
Update exam (name, sections, settings, etc.)
Soft-delete exam (isDeleted = true)
Restore a soft-deleted exam
Permanently delete exam (cascades questions + assignments + submissions)
Recalculate and cache question counts for an exam
List questions for an exam sorted by order; optional sectionId filter
Get a single exam question by ID
Get question counts per exam (comma-separated examIds)
Create a new exam question (auto-assigns order)
Update an exam question
Delete a question (hard delete)
Bulk reorder exam questions
List assignments for a group; optional topicId/isGrammar filter
Get a single assignment by ID
Create a vocabulary/grammar topic assignment
Update assignment (dueDate, constraints, etc.)
Soft-delete an assignment
Permanently delete an assignment
List exam assignments; filter by examId, groupId, or studentId
List soft-deleted assignments for a group
Get a single exam assignment by ID
Create a new exam assignment (notifies group/students)
Update assignment due date and optionally notify
Soft-delete an exam assignment
Restore a soft-deleted exam assignment
Permanently delete an assignment and all its submissions
List submissions for an assignment
Get a single submission by ID
Start an exam (create submission)
Save progress / submit answers / submit exam
Release exam results to student
Release follow-up results to student
Mark results as viewed by student
Mark follow-up results as viewed by student
List all groups (excludes hidden by default)
Get a single group by ID
Get students in a group
Create a new group
Update an existing group
Delete a group permanently
Add/remove resource access for a group. field: topicAccess | grammarAccess | examAccess. action: add | remove
List all users; optional filter by role and status
Get user by ID
Update user fields (role, displayName, disabled, folderAccess, etc.)
Approve pending user with role and optional expiry. Use durationDays OR customExpiresAt.
Renew user access. Use durationDays OR customExpiresAt.
Reject / permanently delete a pending user
Add user to a group (no request body)
Remove user from a group
Get user learning stats
List notifications for a user (newest first)
Get count of unread notifications for a user
Create a single notification (internal use)

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "user_abc123",
  "title": "New Assignment",
  "body": "You have a new exam assignment due April 30.",
  "type": "assignment",
  "relatedId": "64a000000000000000000050"
}

request.description: Mark a single notification as read
Mark all unread notifications as read for a user
List all whitelisted emails; optional filter by role and used status
Check if an email is whitelisted (returns entry or null)
Get a single whitelist entry by ID
Add an email to the whitelist
Bulk add multiple emails to the whitelist
Update a whitelist entry (role, duration, groups, etc.)
Mark a whitelist entry as used (called on registration)
Remove an email from the whitelist
Get all progress records for a user; optional topicId filter
Get progress for a specific word
Get mastery summary for a topic (mastered vs total)
Get streak data for a user
Get streak data for multiple users (teacher dashboard)
Upsert progress for a single word
Record a game result for a word (updates score + masteryScore). gameType examples: flashcard, matching, spelling
Update pronunciation score for a word (0-100)
Reset all progress for a topic (for a user)
Find an SST user by email (for sharing UI autocomplete)
Toggle isPublic. resourceType: topic | teacher_topic | grammar | exam
Toggle teacherVisible (admin resources only). resourceType: topic | grammar | exam
Add a resource to a group access array. resourceType: topic | grammar | exam
Remove a resource from a group access array
Replace entire group access list for a resource
Add resource to individual user access. Use userEmail OR userId.
Remove resource from individual user access
Get all SST access arrays for a user (topicAccess, grammarAccess, examAccess)
Add collaborator to teacher resource. resourceType: teacher_topic | grammar | exam. role: editor | viewer
Remove a collaborator from a teacher resource
Update collaborator role: viewer | editor
Transfer ownership of a teacher resource to another teacher
Get all resources where a teacher is a collaborator
Share admin resource with a teacher. Use teacherEmail OR teacherId.
Remove a teacher from admin resource shared list
Text chat completion (routes to Gemini or OpenRouter based on modelProfile)
Audio evaluation — pronunciation or speaking grading

body.raw:
{
  "modelProfile": "gemini-flash",
  "systemPrompt": "Grade this pronunciation.",
  "userContent": "Evaluate the student pronunciation of the word: apple.",
  "audio": "BASE64_AUDIO_STRING_HERE",
  "mimeType": "audio/webm",
  "responseFormat": "json"
}

request.description: Google Translate TTS proxy — returns base64 audio blob
Google Cloud TTS — returns base64 audio blob
Image generation via Google Imagen
Generate 4 grammar question variations + improved original
Generate 1 single new grammar question variation
Grade a student written/typed grammar answer with AI
AI-grade fill-in-blank typing blanks (returns boolean[])
Classify error category for a grammar question
Grade audio answer for exam/grammar questions
Evaluate pronunciation from audio (returns score, transcript, feedback)
